name: Pistachio Marble Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Yellow cake mix; pudding in
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Combine the cake mix, pudding, eggs, water, oil, and extract in a large mixing bowl. Beat until well combined.
Measure 1 cup of the batter into a separate bowl. Stir in the chocolate syrup.
Add the green food coloring to the remaining batter. Mix until evenly colored.
Alternate spooning the two colored batters into a greased and floured 10-inch bundt pan, zigzagging with a spatula through the layers.
Bake at 350°F for 50-55 minutes or until a tester inserted near the center comes out clean. Do not underbake.
Cool in the pan for about 15 minutes. Remove from the pan and allow to finish cooling on a wire rack.
